Victorian Legislation and Parliamentary Documents 
  
1   Version No. 001  
Economic Development (Repeal) Act 1994 
Act No. 5/1994 
Version as at 1 July 1997 
 
The Parliament of Victoria enacts as follows: 
 1. Purpose 
The purpose of this Act is to repeal the Economic 
Development Act 1981 . 
 2. Commencement 
This Act comes into operation on the day on 
which it receives the Royal Assent. 
 3. Repeal 
The Economic Development Act 1981  is 
repealed . 
 4. Savings 
 (1) Despite the repeal of the Economic Development 
Act 1981 , the repeal does not affect the operation, 
continuity or effect of any grant, loan, agreement, order or declaration made  or given under that Act 
and that Act continues to apply in respect thereof as if it had not been repealed. 
 (2) This section is in addition to and not in derogation 
from the Interpretation of Legislation Act 1984 . 
═══════════════  
Victorian Legislation and Parliamentary Documents 
 Act No. 5/1994  
   
Economic Development (Repeal) Act 1994 
2   ENDNOTES 
1. General Information 
Minister's second reading speech — 
Legislative Assembly: 25 November 1993  
Legislative Council: 29 March 1994  
The long title for the Bill for this Act was "A Bill to repeal the Economic 
Development Act 1981  and for other purposes.". 
The Economic Development (Repeal) Act 1994  was assented to on 27 April 
1994 and came into operation on 27 April 1994. Endnotes
